name: Radish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salt, garlic powder, Dijon mustard, vinegar, liquid shortening, and lemon juice in a screwtop jar.
2. Shake to blend the dressing.
3. Coarsely chop watercress, lettuce, and radishes.
4. Place the chopped vegetables in a salad bowl.
5. Add the dressing and toss until well blended.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 60
